title: Trading Economics Calendar
description: Daily economic data tracking system that fetches and monitors economic indicators from Trading Economics API. Provides automated daily updates and insights.

title: Neural Nexus
description: Multi-domain knowledge base system built with MkDocs Material, featuring interlinked content, D3.js visualization, and automated content management.

title: Hermes Playground
description: Experimental knowledge base and translation system exploring AI agent capabilities, multilingual content processing, and automated workflows.

title: Falling Sand Physics Simulation
description: Interactive cellular automata sandbox with realistic physics. Simulate falling sand, flowing water, solid walls, and dissolving acid in a 150x150 grid with smooth real-time rendering.
